MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rupa Shah, Esq., of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.732.1126, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SEYFARTH SHAW LLP and MAXWELL SIMKOFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Not reported.
